name: waza
description: Personal skill collection for Claude Code: think, check, hunt, design, read, write, learn, health.

plugins.name: health
plugins.description: Audit Claude Code configuration health across all layers. Run when collaboration feels off.

plugins.name: think
plugins.description: Design and validate before building: challenge assumptions, pressure-test the plan, review architecture.

plugins.name: check
plugins.description: Code review with fix-first approach. Analyzes diff, applies safe fixes, verifies with evidence.

plugins.name: hunt
plugins.description: Systematic debugging. Root cause investigation before any fix.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Build distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with a committed aesthetic direction.

plugins.name: read
plugins.description: Fetch any URL or PDF as clean Markdown. Supports WeChat and proxy cascade.

plugins.name: write
plugins.description: Write and edit prose in Tw93's natural style. Chinese and English supported.

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Deep learning from raw materials to published output. Six-phase process for researching and writing about an unfamiliar domain.
